reviews.comment:
Lugar muy lindo, con lugar para estar al aire libre, gran arboleda. La atención excelente tanto en playa como en el local, los baños impecables. Como la mayoría de los ACA. Lástima que le hicieron la AU 8 y si uno viene de CABA hacia Colón, no le dejaron ningún tipo de entrada. Solo se puede entrar si uno viene por el carril opuesto.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place, with plenty of outdoor space and a large grove of trees. Excellent service both on the beach and inside the restaurant, and the restrooms were spotless. Like most ACA locations. It's a shame they built Highway 8, and if you're coming from Buenos Aires towards Colón, they don't have any kind of entrance. You can only get in if you're coming from the opposite direction.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5a3EzR2tBRRAB

reviewer.displayName: Auxilio Remolque El Rafa (Auxilio Remolque El Rafa)

reviews.comment:
Excelente YPF,bien accesible,muy buena la atención.Tienen para comer al paso tartas empanadas hamburguesas sandwich,café etc.Los baños súper limpios.Todo muy bien mantenido y agradable lugar de esparcimiento con parque y buena sombra.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent YPF station, easily accessible, and with very good service. They have snacks like pastries, empanadas, hamburgers, sandwiches, coffee, etc. The restrooms are spotless. Everything is very well maintained, and it's a pleasant place to relax with a park and good shade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdjZ2cFJ3EAE
